# Copilot Context

## Tech Stack

- Node.js
- Express.js
- HBS / Handlebars
- Bootstrap CDN
- CSS
- GitHub
- Render

## Project Structure

ASSIGNMENT1/
├── app.js
├── package.json
├── bin/
│   └── www
├── public/
│   └── stylesheets/
│       └── style.css
├── routes/
│   └── index.js
├── views/
│   ├── layout.hbs
│   ├── index.hbs
│   ├── about.hbs
│   ├── projects.hbs
│   ├── contact.hbs
│   └── error.hbs
└── .github/
    ├── copilot-instructions.md
    ├── copilot-context.md
    ├── copilot-session.md
    ├── copilot-review.md
    └── copilot-fix-plan.md

## Application Summary

This is a personal portfolio website. It contains Home, About Me, Projects, and Contact Me pages. The app uses Express routes to render HBS views.
